channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya Police Heighten Security Around Parliament Ahead of Saba Saba Protests
item.description: Police in Kenya have sealed off Parliament and tightened security across Nairobi's Central Business District ahead of planned Saba Saba demonstrations. The operation involves enhanced checkpoints, ant...

item.title: Trump's NATO Summit Amid Tensions and Ukraine Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump is en route to Ankara, Turkey, for the NATO summit amid heightened tensions with the alliance. The summit occurs against the backdrop of Russia's ongoing war in Ukraine and rece...

item.title: BJ's Wholesale Club Roof Collapse in New Jersey: 27 People Trapped, No Injuries Reported
item.description: A partial roof collapse occurred at a BJ's Wholesale Club in Ocean Township, New Jersey, during severe weather on Monday. Emergency responders were dispatched to the scene after reports of the inciden...

item.title: Trump's controversial World Cup involvement sparks backlash
item.description: President Donald Trump has faced criticism for his overt involvement in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, an event held in high regard by global audiences. During a press conference, Trump expressed relief ove...

item.title: Hikers Rescued After Exhaustion Near Cypress Mountain
item.description: Hikers who became exhausted while hiking near Cypress Mountain were airlifted to safety in a routine rescue operation. The incident, reported on July 6, 2026, highlights the importance of preparedness...

item.title: MI5's Handling of Misogynistic Agent Under Scrutiny
item.description: A secret inquiry by MI5's watchdog has revealed that the intelligence agency was aware of an abusive agent it defended in court, who exhibited misogynistic tendencies and was 'obsessed' with violence....

item.title: NAB proposes inflation adjustment to sustain graft case investigations
item.description: The National Accountability Bureau (NAB) is considering a legal interpretation to adjust inflation-linked thresholds, which could keep numerous corruption cases open. The proposal aims to apply the sa...

item.title: Sandiganbayan denies Bong Revilla's request to attend half-brother's wake
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Third Division has denied former Senator Ramon 'Bong' Revilla Jr.'s request for temporary liberty to attend the wake of his late half-brother, Jojo Bautista. The anti-graft court emp...

item.title: ANC Loyalty and Diplomatic Appointments: Controversy Over South Africa's France Envoy
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's appointment of former State Security Minister Ayanda Dlodlo as South Africa's ambassador to France has sparked significant political controversy. The Democratic Alliance (D...

item.title: Former Deputy Governor of Bauchi State mourns loss of two children in road accident
item.description: Former Bauchi State Deputy Governor Senator Baba Tela is in deep mourning after losing his two children, Mustapha and Ummi, in a tragic road accident on the Bauchi-Azare highway. The incident occurred...

item.title: Sylva Koscina: A Prominent Croatian-Italian Actress of Postwar European Cinema
item.description: Sylva Koscina (1933–1994) was a Croatian-born Italian actress who became one of the most iconic figures of European cinema during the 1950s and 1960s. Known for her striking beauty, long legs, and con...

item.title: Young Entrepreneurs Unite Stakeholders to Boost Tanzania's Tourism Sector
item.description: A group of young entrepreneurs in Tanzania is organizing a significant gathering aimed at connecting key stakeholders across the country to foster collaboration and innovation within the business ecos...

item.title: New Demerit System Faces Challenges with Taxi Industry Resistance
item.description: The article critiques the proposed demerit system for South African drivers, arguing that it fails to address systemic issues in road safety. While the system aims to penalize reckless driving through...

item.title: Aliko Dangote selects Kenya for East Africa's largest oil refinery project
item.description: Africa's richest man, Aliko Dangote, has decided to build his proposed East African oil refinery in Kenya instead of Tanzania. The facility, with a capacity of 700,000 barrels per day, will be the lar...

item.title: Albanese faces scrutiny over complex political relationships
item.description: The article critiques Prime Minister Anthony Albanese's handling of intricate diplomatic and political relationships, suggesting he avoids direct engagement with challenging issues. It highlights the ...

item.title: LSK Demands Swift Justice After Advocate's Murder in Kenya
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) has strongly condemned the killing of advocate Edward Muthee Kariuki, calling it a dark moment for the legal profession and the nation. The society demanded immediate an...

item.title: Sindh CTD Thwarts Major Terrorist Plot in Karachi, Arrests Two BLA Members
item.description: The Sindh Counter-terrorism Department (CTD) successfully thwarted a major terrorist plot in Karachi by arresting two members of the Baloch Liberation Army (BLA). The operation, conducted on July 6, i...

item.title: ASX declines on coal and gold miner weakness amid global market volatility
item.description: Australian shares experienced a notable decline on Tuesday, driven by weak earnings from Samsung and heightened geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. The S&P/ASX 200 Index dropped 27.1 points...

item.title: Chiz Escudero's Role in Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte has entered its second phase, with Senator Chiz Escudero serving as the presiding officer despite his controversial past. Escudero, who previously ...

item.title: PS Plus July 2026 Game Lineup: Confirmed Titles and Titles Leaving the Service
item.description: The PlayStation Plus service for July 2026 continues to offer a mixed selection of games across its Essential, Extra, and Premium tiers. While the quality of titles varies, the month may see a shift i...
